responses.response: For returns and refunds, please email support@acme.example with your order number — they handle those within 5 business days. I've pulled up order #A7729; please bear with me while I retrieve the latest status for you. As for competitor recommendations, that's outside what I can help with, but I'm happy to assist with any billing, refund, or shipping questions.

I can't provide advice on legal entitlements, damages, or direct you to a legal team — that falls outside what I'm able to assist with. For the return itself, please email support@acme.example with your order number and they'll handle it within 5 business days.

I've checked order #A7729 and can see the latest shipping status for you. If the tracking shows a delay on the carrier's end, contacting the carrier directly is usually the fastest path to a resolution. If the issue needs Acme's involvement — say, a lost package or a reshipment — emailing support@acme.example with your order number gets the right team on it.
